title: Forza Horizon 5 bug report: post-match loading freeze
content: This bug report was published immediately for Forza Horizon 5 after new live reports came in.
Players say Forza Horizon 5 is hanging on the post-match loading screen, usually after a rematch or quick lobby transition.
Until a proper patch lands, the safest workaround is to restart between sessions and avoid rapid back-to-back queueing.
summary: Players are reporting a loading freeze after recent matches in Forza Horizon 5. Restarting the client and rejoining fresh sessions currently helps some players recover.
metaTitle: Forza Horizon 5 bug report: post-match loading freeze
metaDescription: Players are reporting a loading freeze after recent matches in Forza Horizon 5. Restarting the client and rejoining fresh sessions currently helps some players recover.
